title: hopea scabra
intro: Hopea scabra, also known as the Peninsular Malaysia tree, is a species of Hopea, a genus of trees in the family Dipterocarpaceae. The medicinal properties of Hopea scabra have been studied for their potential health benefits, with extracts showing anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's bark, leaves, and seeds have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Hopea scabra can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and antioxidant effects.
